trial_details.eval_reason: Pod is Running with all containers ready (1/1)
trial_details.trajectory:
I'll help you diagnose and fix the Kubernetes pod "volume-mount-app" in the "case7-test" namespace. I'll follow the process step by step.

### PHASE 1: DIAGNOSE### DIAGNOSIS
The pod is failing to start due to a missing ConfigMap named "app-configuration". The error message shows: "MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume "config-volume" : configmap "app-configuration" not found".

### PHASE 2: FIX
I'll create the missing ConfigMap to resolve the volume mount issue.### PHASE 3: STOP
1. What was wrong: The pod could not start because the required ConfigMap "app-configuration" was missing.
2. What I fixed: Created the ConfigMap "app-configuration" in the "case7-test" namespace.

FIX COMPLETE

## COMMANDS EXECUTED:
1. $ kubectl get pod volume-mount-app -n case7-test
   Output: NAME               READY   STATUS              RESTARTS   AGE
volume-mount-app   0/1     ContainerCreating   0          13s...
2. $ kubectl describe pod volume-mount-app -n case7-test
   Output: Name:             volume-mount-app
Namespace:        case7-test
Priority:         0
Service Account:  default
Node:             minikube/192.168.49.2
Start Time:       Thu, 25 Dec 2025 04:11:21 +0300
...
3. $ kubectl logs volume-mount-app -n case7-test
   Output: Exit code 1
Error from server (BadRequest): container "volume-mount-app" in pod "volume-mount-app" is waiting to start: ContainerCreating...
4. $ kubectl create configmap app-configuration -n case7-test --from-literal=key1=value1
   Output: configmap/app-configuration created...
